description:
# .43.G — lower_with's else cascade REPLACED by matrix dispatch

## What changes

lower_with (src/ir_lower.rs ~2459) has two parts:
- The `<-` bindings: SEQUENTIAL thread, NOT a parallel match. Unchanged
  by this ticket (lower_pattern_bind subsumed in .H).
- The else-clauses inside with_fail_cont: a multi-clause cascade
  identical in shape to lower_case's. THIS gets matrix.

So .G is .F applied inside with_fail_cont. Same callback shape (always
cont-fn-wrap).

## What stays

- The outer `<-` thread
- with_fail_cont minting + invocation
- unmatched_v plumbing
- join_opt

## What's removed

- ~40 LOC of else-clause try_blocks cascade
- Third copy of the dispatch-by-cascade pattern (now ZERO copies)

## Acceptance

- with-using fixtures: meaningfully tighter OR equivalent
- Three-path parity

## Risk

with-else currently errors on guards (line 2572). v1 keeps that;
matrix encounters guarded row, callback errors with same message.
title: fz-ul4.43.G: wire lower_with's pattern step onto matrix
